title: The Masked Intruders
description: Franky is forced into the center of the conflict as CP9 targets both him and Iceburg for the ancient weapon blueprints.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Iceburg, Nico Robin, Chopper, Rob Lucci, Franky. Franky is forced into the center of the conflict as CP9 targets both him and Iceburg for the ancient weapon blueprints.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Any citizen who doesn't cooperate with us.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: The world government has... changed their opinions.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: who are suffering from pirate attacks.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: The whole world will fight over it,

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: You don't trust the government, do you,

dialogue.speaker: Rob Lucci
dialogue.text: You knew that, and you still didn't...

dialogue.speaker: Rob Lucci
dialogue.text: Try to hand it over to anyone.

summary: Franky is forced into the center of the conflict as CP9 targets both him and Iceburg for the ancient weapon blueprints.
